listeners.purpose: Atomic invoice creation on membership signup. Creates a draft invoice with lines for the membership_charge + setup_fee + any coupon discount. Sets invoice.membership_id + invoice.membership_renewal_id. Runs in the same transaction as MembershipCreated (per membership module's atomic_membership_invoice_creation rule).
Per-renewal invoice creation. Fires on each successful MembershipRenewal — creates a new draft invoice for that period, references the MembershipRenewal via membership_renewal_id.

Async-tax cascade. When a TaxCalculation completes for an invoice line, check if all lines on the parent invoice are now taxed; if so + settings.auto_finalize_on_tax_complete=true, dispatch FinalizeInvoiceJob.
When the coupon module fires CouponRedeemed for a redemption linked to an invoice, dispatch ApplyCouponToInvoiceJob to create the discount_line + update the invoice's discount_amount_cents.

The load-bearing paid-invoice signal. When the payment module confirms a payment intent linked to an invoice (via metadata.invoice_id), aggregates the transaction total against invoice.total_cents and transitions status accordingly (paid / partially_paid). Fires InvoicePaid which cascades to marketing + membership activation.

When the refund module fires refund.issued for a payment on an invoice, dispatch GenerateCreditNoteJob to create the reversal credit_note. Transitions invoice.status paid → refunded (full refund) or leaves at paid (partial refund).
When a chargeback is filed against an invoice's payment, transition status paid → disputed. Fires InvoiceDisputed for downstream ops handoff.
Rare recovery path. When a chargeback is resolved in the merchant's favor (customer's bank sided with the tenant), transition invoice.status disputed → paid.

When the customer's bank forces a chargeback in their favor, dispatch GenerateCreditNoteJob (reason='chargeback_settled') to record the reversal. Invoice.status stays 'disputed' with state_reason='chargeback_lost'.

Compliance-critical PRE-erasure hook. Fires BEFORE the TenantErased cascade drops the invoice/credit_note tables. Copies every row + PDF into the compliance archive (S3 Glacier with regulator-facing metadata) to satisfy the 7-10y financial retention obligation. Runs at priority 10 (very early) — must complete before the tenancy module's cascade fires.
Post-archive cascade delete via FK CASCADE. Emits count metrics + writes the compliance audit trail entry.
Individual GDPR Art. 17. Nulls PII fields on invoices + credit_notes where customer is the erased user.

When a tenant is suspended, pause the dunning schedule for their invoices. Sets collection_status='paused' on all in_dunning invoices; DispatchDunningRemindersJob refuses when status='paused'. Restored on TenantResumed.
Reverse PauseDunningOnTenantSuspended. Sets collection_status='in_dunning' + re-enqueues the appropriate DispatchDunningRemindersJob for the current days_past_due stage.

When a customer revokes consent (marketing / advertising), invoicing continues (contractual necessity per GDPR Art. 6(1)(b) — the invoicing relationship does not require ongoing consent). This listener merely LOGS the revocation on the customer's invoices for compliance evidence. Notifications for those invoices continue to fire (transactional_required tier).
